title: Zeff Explains the Baratie’s Harsh Rules
description: On pages 9–12, the crew reaches the floating restaurant Baratie, where Luffy’s impulsiveness, Fullbody’s arrogance, and Sanji’s sharp code collide.
scene: The Baratie is loud, violent, and rule-bound: cooks fight like pirates, customers cause trouble, and Sanji’s character begins to emerge through conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: No, stop!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: God, it just gets me so angry...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hold him down or he might seriously kill him!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: To see a damn spoiled son of a bitch like you!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Stop, Sanji! You've went too far!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Just who the hell do you think you are!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ack!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: W-What's with this guy!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Aghhhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What is it this time!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ugh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whew, that scared the crap outta me.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: S-Sir, what are you doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Shit! The ceiling of my beautiful restaurant is...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: This is all your fault, you damn brat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You destroyed it yourself!C

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: SIR! Please stop Sanji for us!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sanji! Are you running wild in my restaurant again...?

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: Shut up, you shitty geezer...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's exactly as it seems, sir! And this time, Sanji beat up some idiot marine lieutenant!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Are you trying to ruin my restaurant, you little shit!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ah, isn't that the guy who fired the cannonball earlier?

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: Why's He All Bloodied-Up...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And you! Get the hell out AlR- Eady!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: GYAAAAAAAA!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: E-even the owner of this place is violent!?

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: Just what do they think their customers are!? Just who do they think I am!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: This barbaric and violent restaurant is... just like a pirate ship!

summary: This part introduces the Baratie as more than a restaurant; it is a battlefield of pride, hunger, and harsh principles that will define Sanji’s arc.
